pageContext.name: Barbara
pageContext.description: 'Let the show begin!'  From the next-generation open-world RPG Genshin Impact, Kotobukiya is proud to present the lovely Barbara Statue!  Barbara, Deaconess of the Church of Favonius and idol of Mondstadt, comes to life in a dynamic 1:7 scale statue. Her undeniable charm has been fully and impressively recreated, complete with her loveable expression and fluttering skirt. She also comes with singing effects that have been produced with clear parts and can be removed for multiple display options!  Barbara's energetic smile is sure to bring a smile to your face as well! Add her to your collection today!
